title: Lush 16x
description: Cyberpunk mixed with cozy lush textures!
body:
# ﻿EARLY ACCESS RELEASE
**Lush is a Cyberpunk-cozy lush style texture pack that mixes both mediums in best possible way!**

Its one of a kind pack that will suit all types of players with all types of gameplays be it adventuring or building.
Pack focuses on vibrant colours but based on old J-rpgs to bring out nostalgia of these games while keeping somewhat simplistic style but with more detail than other packs which makes it easy on the eyes of players.

Everything in the pack is subject to change as its early access and if you want to help the development/leave feedback or share screenshots please join our discord!
[![discord](https://i.ibb.co/W0NNg6K/discord.png)](https://discord.gg/GmKrkXAY83)
